title: HQM Keybind
description: Adds a keybind to open Hardcore Questing Mode's quest book without the book.
body:
# What is this?
* This is a small extension for the mod ["Hardcore Questing Mode"](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hardcore-questing-mode).
* The extension adds a keybind to the Controls menu that lets you quickly open HQM's quest book UI without needing to hold and use a Quest Book item.

# Why would I use this?
* The ability to open the quest UI with a keybind is provided by other questing mods, but not by HQM in 1.7.10.
* Having to carry around a Quest Book item is clunky and inconvenient. It takes up a valuable inventory slot, and forces you to either keep it on your hotbar or search through your inventory for it any time you want to view your quests.

# Multiplayer Disclaimer
HQM Keybind will not work unless installed on both the server and the client.
